items.title: 2026 News Releases - NASA
items.content_text: Sign up to receive NASA news releases and other information.

items.title: Crew Unloads Dragon and Begins New Space Experiments - NASA
items.content_text: New science experiments are getting underway aboard the International Space Station after a SpaceX Dragon spacecraft delivered about 6,500 pounds of cargo on Sunday, May 17. The Expedition 74 crew spent Monday unloading the new supplies, kicking off new research, and gearing up for a spacewalk.

items.title: SpaceX Dragon Docks to Station Filled with New Science Experiments - NASA
items.content_text: At 6:37 a.m. EDT, the SpaceX Dragon spacecraft docked to the forward port of the International Space Station’s Harmony module, carrying nearly 6,500 pounds of food, supplies, and equipment for the Expedition 74 crew. This is the 34th SpaceX commercial resupply services mission to the space station for NASA.

items.title: News | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: Keep up with the latest from Rocket Lab.

items.title: Rocket Lab To Acquire Robotics Leader Motiv Space Systems | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: The acquisition will add proven robotics technology used in Mars rovers and also insources precision space mechanisms such as solar array drive assemblies, one of the critical components needed for satellite constellation manufacturing.

items.title: Rocket Lab Awarded $30 Million Contract for HASTE Hypersonic Rocket Launches for Anduril | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: Long Beach, California. May 7, 2026 – Rocket Lab Corporation (Nasdaq: RKLB), a global leader in launch services and space systems, today announced it has been selected by defense technology company Anduril Industries for multiple hypersonic test flights with its HASTE launch vehicle. The…

items.title: Rocket Lab’s Biggest Launch Deal Yet:  Confidential Customer Books Multiple Neutron and Electron Launches | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: The multi-launch contract includes dedicated missions on five Neutron and three Electron rockets for a confidential customer with the launches baselined for 2026-2029

items.title: Rocket Lab and Raytheon Selected To Demonstrate Advanced Capabilities For U.S. Space Force’s Space Based Interceptor Program  | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: LONG BEACH, Calif., May 7, 2026 – Rocket Lab Corporation (Nasdaq: RKLB), a leading launch and space systems company, today announced that in partnership with Raytheon it has been selected to demonstrate advanced capabilities for the United States Space Force’s Space Based Interceptor program. items.title: Rocket Lab Unveils New High-Performance Star Tracker Optimized for Accuracy in Increased Radiation Environments | Rocket Lab
